thread_title: ✅「Answered」Resetting Helot but ended up resetting Nautilla

content:
I'm not sure who I should reach out to, but I'd like to volunteer.

I'm only in Chapter 2, but I've been spotting several easy fixes that I could probably sort through in a single weekend, from awkward phrasing, to typos, incorrect pronouns, inconsistent terminology, etc. I'm very much of the opinion that the current state of the English localization isn't helping attract new players, and I personally know more than a handful that were so put off by what they heard or experienced themselves, that they never gave the game a shot or uninstalled shortly after trying it out.

This game deserves better, and I want to help.
thread_title: Volunteering to aid with the English translation!

thread_title: ✅「Answered」Ouroboros codex missing after buying with couple of days left

content:
I heard that with the 1st anniversary event you had a daily banner in which you could pull for any awakener. I don't know if you are planning to do the same again. I'd like to suggest a story idea for it.

Each day an awakener visits Daffodil's shop and we get to learn more about that awakener.

Examples: 

Lily comes in looking for a gift for the keeper. Why she selects something reveals something about her character.

Goliath comes in and offers trophy heads to Daffodil. And Daffodil pays him for his services.

Pandia comes in looking for a quirky gift for herself.....

And you can go on and on with odd interactions that people have in Daffodil's shop. 

You could also provide festival skins....or something.
